        "body": "### Dockerfile Optimization\n\nThis PR introduces several optimizations to the Dockerfile to enhance security, reduce image size, and follow best practices:\n\n1. **Base Image Change**: Switched from `python:3.10-slim-buster` to `python:3.10-alpine` for a smaller and more secure image.\n2. **Chained RUN Commands**: Combined multiple `RUN` commands into a single layer to reduce image size and improve build speed.\n3. **Use of COPY Instead of ADD**: Ensured the use of `COPY` for better clarity and predictability.\n4. **Non-Root User**: Added a non-root user to enhance security.\n5. **Multi-Stage Build**: Introduced a multi-stage build to separate the build environment from the runtime environment.\n6. **.dockerignore**: Added a `.dockerignore` file to exclude unnecessary files from the build context.\n\nThese changes collectively improve the security, efficiency, and maintainability of the Docker image.",
